warden_encounter.title: Encounter the Warden — observe its behavior without dying

subtitle.text: You cannot win this fight. That is not the test.

description: The Warden spawns when the Sculk Shrieker activates four times.
It is blind. It hunts by sound and vibration.
It cannot be outrun, but it can be lost.
Swift Sneak from the Ancient City removes footstep vibrations while crouching.
Wool blocks vibrations between the player and the Warden.
Snowballs and arrows distract it — throw them in the opposite direction.
The test is not killing the Warden.
The test is navigating the city it lives in.
The loot is behind it. The exit is past it.
Sculk Sensors detect vibrations and emit redstone signals.
Sculk Catalysts convert death drops into sculk growth.
Both have unique technical uses in automation.
